creator: ripley@nostromo.in-berlin.de
text:
Building port x11-toolkits/gtk12 depends on shared library
	"libintl.1" supplied by devel/gettext.
	The port of gettext installs /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.1.0
	whereas the configure script of gtk expects libintl.so.1

Fix: 

My workaround was a softlink to present the library under the
	expected filename.
